title: 没钱所以挂载于Github的神秘没什么用而且还浪费时间的站
bottomText: 所有内容请在允许下转载和截图录屏,评论区需要点击sign up登录github账号解锁

indexScript: <script>(function(){var _f0=window.fetch;window.fetch=function(url,opts){if(typeof url==='string'&&url==='/rss.xml')url='/yinglaoqi/rss.xml';return _f0.call(this,url,opts)};})();</script><script src='https://blog.154451.xyz/assets/NumPagination.js'></script><script>(function(){var saved='',restoring=false;function restore(){if(!saved||restoring)return;var cur=document.body.getAttribute('style')||'';if(saved.indexOf('background')>-1&&cur.indexOf('background')===-1){restoring=true;document.body.setAttribute('style',saved);setTimeout(function(){restoring=false},200)}}function animRows(){var rows=document.querySelectorAll('.Box-row');rows.forEach(function(r,i){r.style.cssText='opacity:0;transform:translateY(12px)';setTimeout(function(){r.style.cssText='opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);transition:opacity .38s ease,transform .38s ease';setTimeout(function(){r.removeAttribute('style')},420)},25+i*60)})}window.addEventListener('load',function(){setTimeout(function(){saved=document.body.getAttribute('style')||'';var obs=new MutationObserver(function(){restore()});obs.observe(document.body,{attributes:true,attributeFilter:['style']});animRows()},1000)});var _f1=window.fetch;window.fetch=function(){return _f1.apply(this,arguments).then(function(r){setTimeout(function(){restore();animRows()},180);return r})};var _xo=XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open;XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open=function(){this.addEventListener('load',function(){setTimeout(function(){restore();animRows()},180)});_xo.apply(this,arguments)}})();</script>
